context_for_next_testing_agent: In-Charge FULL self-approval workflow (Phase 1→4) verified working correctly. Key status transitions: draft → pending_phase1 → phase1_approved → pending_phase2 → phase2_approved → pending_stage2_surgical → stage2_surgical_approved → pending_stage2_prosthetic → stage2_prosthetic_step1_approved → pending_final_delivery → completed. All 5 approval endpoints support is_incharge_self_created auto-approve pattern. Supervisor listing correctly excludes in-charge-created cases.
